notes: [STUB] wyvern.pain — Pain reaction (0.5s window, pain anim): anim_pain1 '3 1 2' frame group is not played (logical MonsterAnim.Pain only); CSQC monster frame playback deferred system-wide.

[STUB] wyvern.deadthink — Dead-think: swap to anim_die2 once the corpse lands: die2 landed-corpse frame group is not played: the port's logical anim phase has no die1/die2 split (one MonsterAnim.Death), so the visible swap is CSQC-deferred. The landing IS detected and the hook IS driven.
